channel.title: Pure and Applied Chemistry
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Pure and Applied Chemistry

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Huahua Fan, Pengcheng Yan, Jianxiang Teng, Xiaobin Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2025-frontmatter3

item.title: Design and antibacterial application of silver phthalocyanine-silver modified silicate immobilized on fabric

item.title: Gold nanoparticles capped with α-cyclodextrin for dual colorimetric sensing of Fe3+ and Cr3+ in tap water
item.description: Article by Huahua Fan, Pengcheng Yan, Jianxiang Teng, Xiaobin Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0211

item.title: Removal of acidic dyes; acid yellow 25 and acid red 4 from wastewater by degassed activated carbon
item.description: Article by Huahua Fan, Pengcheng Yan, Jianxiang Teng, Xiaobin Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0240

item.title: ImageJ and smartphone app chemistry analyzer using image-based colorimetric assay for quantitative detection of melamine
item.description: Article by Huahua Fan, Pengcheng Yan, Jianxiang Teng, Xiaobin Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0254

item.title: Nanotube formation and coating of hydroxyapatite-polyvinyl alcohol-collagen composite on Ti-6Al-4V metal alloy
item.description: Article by Huahua Fan, Pengcheng Yan, Jianxiang Teng, Xiaobin Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0248

item.title: Nano gold catalyst preparation and it’s p-nitrophenol catalytic degradation properties

item.title: Synthesis and characterization of gelzan nanocomposite scaffold incorporating Ag/Fe2+ co-doped hydroxyapatite for antibacterial bone tissue regeneration
item.description: Article by Huahua Fan, Pengcheng Yan, Jianxiang Teng, Xiaobin Tian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pac-2024-0255
